failedAssertions.reason: Traceability matrix includes many links to files absent from the project root.
File-path navigation/linking is missing, so spec→code navigation is incomplete.
Console error observed on /build/ violates assertion requirement of zero JavaScript errors across sidebar pages.
Contract-specified endpoints for verification were unavailable on this API surface (/api/map/solution/domain/entities and /api/status).
Project-scoped traceability API route is not implemented in this surface.
Build did not produce new traceability links for generated artifacts in this run.
Traceability matrix contains many non-existent file paths.
API traceability links did not map to existing route handler files/functions.
Required entity link-type coverage (type+migration+implementation) was missing.
No behaviour traceability entry contained test-type links.
Component/view link typing was inconsistent and included missing/non-matching files.
Codegen rerun did not update or mark stale traceability link in tested spec entry.
This build run did not produce new traceability links across categories (0 new links added).
No positive/green linked indicator was observed.
Warning-specific indicator styling for unlinked specs was not present.
GitHub URL linkage was not generated despite origin remote being GitHub.
Line-range deep-linking could not occur because GitHub href generation failed.
DOM probe found hasNotFoundText=false and warningClassCount=0 while displaying missing path stale/old_component.tsx.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked by assignment constraint: do not start/stop shared services in this run.
Blocked by shared preloaded data (non-empty traceability matrix) and no safe in-scope reset path without impacting other validators.
Blocked by missing test preconditions in assigned running environment: no 50+ entity / 100+ file traceability dataset available to validate large-scale rendering behavior.
Blocked by inability to reliably create a partial-codegen state on shared running services; build requests either complete quickly or interruption yields no partial traceability updates.

Blocked by environment/state precondition: build endpoint completed successfully but did not produce any new traceability links (files_written=[]; entry/coverage counts unchanged), so assertion condition of 'newly generated links appear without reload' could not be exercised.
Precondition not satisfiable in assigned shared runtime: traceability data already populated before this run, and validator was not permitted to restart/reset shared services.

appliedUpdates.description: Added traceability round-1 validation notes covering API route surface, build/no-delta behavior, empty-state preconditions, and build-page console error check.
